ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the simulation */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of simulation (e.g., climate, fluid dynamics) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was last updated */,
  "simulation_tags" TEXT /* Tags to categorize the simulation */,
  "simulation_status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., active, inactive, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., Celsius, Pascals) */,
  "metric_tags" TEXT /* Tags to categorize the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., scalar, vector) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., time, iteration) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter (e.g., seconds, iterations) */,
  "parameter_tags" TEXT /* Tags to categorize the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., input, output) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this data belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric this data represents */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter this data is associated with */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric at the specified time and parameter */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the data was collected */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_data_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_data_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the simulation */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration was initiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., plot, graph, chart) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
